paper.title: Doppel’s AI defense system stops attacks before they spread
paper.abstract: Discover how Doppel uses OpenAI’s GPT-5 and reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) to stop deepfake and impersonation attacks before they spread, cutting analyst workloads by 80% and reducing threat response from hours to minutes.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
